ogTitle: Halekulani vs Hallidays Point: Climate Safety

heading: Halekulani vs Hallidays Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Halekulani, New South Wales and Hallidays Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Halekulani and Hallidays Point have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Halekulani or Hallidays Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Halekulani has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Hallidays Point scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Halekulani scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Hallidays Point scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Halekulani or Hallidays Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Halekulani has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
